name: Stride Procedural Sky & Day/Night
description: A fully procedural sky on a camera-following dome: zenith-to-horizon gradient, sun disc + halo, a textured moon with phases, drifting multi-layer clouds, twinkling stars and a sunset/anti-twilight glow. A built-in day/night clock rotates the sun and moon and drives a directional light. No textures or cubemaps.
